draws.title: Six of Pentacles
draws.message: Support, memory, and restoration are available. Let care move both ways. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: Three of Pentacles
draws.message: Something is beginning to take shape through collaboration, practice, or patience. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: The Chariot
draws.message: Your movement matters, even when the road is uneven.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: choose your direction and take the next step.

draws.title: King of Wands
draws.message: Power is most sacred when it protects, steadies, and serves. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: Death
draws.message: Something can end without meaning you failed.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: let one old version of yourself rest.

draws.title: Ace of Wands
draws.message: A new beginning is glowing. Protect the spark before demanding the harvest. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: Ace of Swords
draws.message: A new beginning is glowing. Protect the spark before demanding the harvest. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Seven of Pentacles
draws.message: Not every option deserves your energy. Choose what is aligned, not merely loud. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: Six of Swords

draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: The High Priestess
draws.message: The quiet answer may be the truest one.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: make space for your inner voice.

draws.title: Queen of Cups
draws.message: This card asks you to lead through presence, care, and inner authority. In the realm of cups, your water medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: respond with emotional honesty and care.

draws.title: Judgement
draws.message: A deeper call is rising through you. You do not have to ignore it.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: answer one truth you have been avoiding.

draws.title: Eight of Swords
draws.message: Progress is happening. Stay present with the rhythm instead of rushing the result. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Five of Pentacles
draws.message: Tension is present, but it is not the whole story. Let friction reveal what needs healing. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: Two of Swords
draws.message: Two paths are asking for your attention. Choose with your whole self, not only your fear. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: The Moon
draws.message: Not all shadows are warnings. Some are invitations inward.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: listen to what your dreams are trying to soften.

draws.title: Ten of Wands
draws.message: A cycle is heavy, full, or ready to transform. You may put some of it down. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
